## The problem

<!-- What user need / use case is this solving? Skip "wouldn't it be cool if…" — describe the pain. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like to see. UI mockups welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else might solve the same problem? Why is the proposed approach better? -->

## Scope

<!-- Is this a small UI tweak, a new backend service, a config knob? Roughly how big? -->

## Anything else

<!-- Related issues, prior art in similar tools, willingness to contribute the implementation, etc. -->
